analysisTime: 初步分析：疑似因为气压计异常引起高度错误，导致雷达建图异常后进行防地升高，自主模式下升高到100米切手动，但手动数据未进行回传，可能是在下降的过程中没电坠落。需要上传雷达日志 无人机日志跟飞控日志核实确认最终原因。
FPV:The height of the uav was rising,The FPV did not record the faulty shot.
Data Dashboard:Abnormal relative altitude displayed, with remote control signal loss alert on main screen.

Preliminary analysis: Abnormal barometer readings caused altitude errors, resulting in faulty radar mapping and automatic terrain avoidance climb. The aircraft switched to manual mode after ascending to 100 m, yet manual flight data failed to transmit. The unit likely crashed due to power depletion during descent. Upload radar, drone and flight controller logs to confirm the root cause.
workOrderNo: 疑似主控问题——气压计异常

analysisTime: Suspected main controller issue – abnormal barometer readings

initialAnalysis: 大屏数据：飞机起飞时，大屏故障同时播报左后机臂未卡紧和炸机。
finalConclusion:

Suspected operational error – Unlocked loose arm frame

problemType: 疑似雷达问题——识别过近Suspected Radar Issue – Overly Short Detection Distance
initialAnalysis:
FPV:无人机自主高速作业，作业高度下降坠机。
大屏数据：飞机故障作业速度为13.8m/s，仿地高度从3.3m降到0m。四路电机速度同步下滑。
初步分析：疑似前雷达故障，导致飞机无法仿地，需要视觉日志进行核实确认。
FPV: During high-speed autonomous operation, the working altitude dropped and the aircraft crashed.
Dashboard Data: Operation speed at the moment of fault was 13.8 m/s; terrain-following altitude dropped from 3.3 m to 0 m; RPM of all four motors declined synchronously.
Preliminary Analysis: Suspected front radar malfunction preventing terrain-following. Vision log is required for verification.

FPV：无人机起飞过程中，右脚架变形。
初步分析：脚架没有解锁，导致起飞时崩裂。
FPV: During takeoff, the right landing gear deformed.
Preliminary Analysis: The landing gear was not unlocked, causing it to break during takeoff.
problemType:
操作问题——操作失误
The crash is attributed to operator error.

initialAnalysis:
FPV:无，无人机自主作业，后切手动，返航至起降点，作业高度降低坠机。
大屏数据：飞机电池电量低，手动控制，航线末端难以维持动力，作业高度2s内由3.9m降至0.
problemType:
操作问题——电池电压耗尽 
Operation Issue – Battery Voltage Depleted

initialAnalysis:
FPV:无人机自主高速作业，向左偏离航线炸机。
大屏数据：飞机进出作业速度为12.2m/s,作业高度由3.6米m降至1.9m，左前桨叶动力短时丢失。倾倒炸机。
problemType:
疑似动力问题——左前异常
Power Issue – Front-Left Abnormality
